headline: Iron Mountain Stock Up 29.3% in Three Months: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: IRM stock jumps 29% in three months as strong storage revenues and surging data center growth fuel momentum.

headline: DLR Boosts Data Center Infrastructure: Is It a Growth Catalyst?
summary: Digital Realty pushes global data center expansion with new sites in Portugal, Bulgaria and Malaysia to capture surging AI-driven demand for digital infrastructure.
